var.name: interview__id
var.labl: Unique 32-character long identifier of the interview

var.name: interview__key
var.labl: Interview key (identifier in XX-XX-XX-XX format)

var.name: sssys_irnd
var.labl: Random number in the range 0..1 associated with interview

var.name: has__errors
var.labl: Errors count in the interview

var.name: interview__status
var.labl: Status of the interview

var.labl: 0.1 N° du Questionnaire

var.name: S3_1
var.labl: III.1 Dans votre commune, au total, il y’a combien de %rostertitle% ?

qstn.ivuInstr: Mettez ‘99’ si la réponse est NSP
